title: Doc (numbers widget size issue)

posts.author: desmonda (Andrew Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Does anyone know if it’s possible to reduce the text size within the Numbers Widget?
I am creating a “doc”. When trying to resize the Numbers widget, the display number will only reduce to a certain size within the frame. At its smallest, the text becomes larger than the frame and is cut-off.

Ideally i’d like to reduce the “number” to a small size, but it doesn’t allow you to.
Thanks.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Andrew! This sounds like odd behavior! Are you resizing it by the lower right corner or a different way?

When I resize it to its smallest size via the little blue circle that appears in the lower right corner, the widget does not cut off the number.

Perhaps you can try duplicating the widget and resizing that one? Do you have other widgets next to this widget that might be limiting how it can be resized?
